title: Stateless Counter UI
description: Build a simple UI that displays a number, using a Stateless widget.
problemStatement:
Stateless widgets are immutable. Build a widget that displays the text `"Value: 10"` in a `Text` widget with a font size of `24`.

**Requirement:** Place this inside a `Center` widget.
expectedOutput: A screen with 'Value: 10' in large text at the center.
